Video.summary: The GYC crew is under the gun to get the '71 Cuda 340 Triple Black 'Phantasm' Tribute car finished by the end of the week. With the exhaust, ornamation, and the engine start still ahead of them, will they be able to finish the car before the director of the 'Phantasm' movie franchise arrives?
Video.title: Phantasm ‘Cuda

Video.summary: Mark and the team rush to complete the triple-black, '71 Cuda, Phantasm homage car. The director and star of Phantasm, Don Coscarelli and A. Michael Baldwin, visit Graveyard Carz to check out the homage car and hopefully, drive it around town.
Video.title: Back in Triple Black

Video.summary: The team tears down Mike Hill's '70 Superbird and finishes up final touches on Chris Driscoll's '70 AAR Cuda. Daren confronts Mark about stealing parts from his car and Mark gets a rematch on Chris Driscoll's race track.
Video.title: AAR You Ready for This?

Video.summary: Holly asks Mark if she can work on cars. Mark Cain from Bad Boy Blasters brings the crew a huge gift. The '70 Barracuda Convertible is torn down and sent to the dipper, progress is made on the '70 Sunroof Challenger and Mark gets a surprise from one of his favorite actors.
Video.title: Go for It!

Video.summary: Mark installs the hood decal on the '70 Sunroof Challenger, Holly helps Josh disassemble the Barracuda suspension, Mark and Daren work on the 440 engine for the Challenger, and the team assembles one of the rarest Mopar options, the sunroof for the '70 Challenger.
Video.title: Get Your Hands Dirty

Video.summary: The team rushes to ready the '69 Dodge Daytona for Tom Partridge and his family's visit. The guys settle a leadership dispute the old fashioned way, the Graveyard Carz van gets a face lift, and Daren retaliates when Mark won't let him sign for deliveries.
Video.title: W-O-M-A-N, Mark Woman

Video.summary: Holly helps Mark on the '70 Challenger, Daren annoys everyone with his popcorn and causes Mark to damage a very rare car. Tony D'Agostino, from Tony's Mopar Parts, visits and lends a hand on the '70 sunroof Challenger. Mark lets Holly in on the big secret and Daren reveals a secret of his own.
Video.title: Pop Secrets

Video.summary: Mark gets a portable showroom, the '70 Hemi Charger is dissembled and the team finishes the 1970 Sunroof Challenger. Mark finally reveals his big secret project to the Graveyard Carz team and Royal makes a video tribute to the Sunroof Challenger.
Video.title: Let the Sunshine In

Video.summary: Mark and the ghouls build out the 440 Super Commando engine for their '70 Plymouth Superbird and install the suspension for the '69 Daytona Charger. Daren finally has enough of Mark's foolishness.
Video.title: The Royal Treatment

Video.summary: Body man Derrick becomes an official Graveyard Carz crew member and assists in the disassembly of the rare '67 Plymouth Hemi GTX Convertible. Josh and Daren play "the game" with Mark.
Video.title: The Grand Torino

Video.summary: Mark and the Ghoulz get a massive sheet-metal order from AMD for their '70 Plymouth Superbird. Meanwhile, the owners of the '72 Charger visit and talk about what made their car so special. Daren gets the offer of a lifetime on his '70 Challenger R/T.
Video.title: The Waltons

Video.summary: Nick Rutter, along with special guest Bruno Massel, walks you through step-by-step on how to perform a waterless wash, clay and polish, applying a sealant, and finishing with a topcoat wax on a brand-new car.
Video.title: Detailing a Brand New Car Part 1

Image.alt: Detailing a Brand New Car Part 1
Detailing a Brand New Car Part 1
Detailing a Brand New Car Part 1

Video.summary: Nick Rutter provides valuable tips and techniques for cleaning and rejuvenating your cars interior
Video.title: Interior Car Care

Video.summary: Bryan takes a trip to San Antonio to teach some of our nations heroes how to weld.
Video.title: Operation Comfort

Video.summary: We tackle an A/C cooling problem on a Toyota Tacoma and introduce you to Kevin’s Hot Rod BMW.
Video.title: Cold Air, Hot Rod

Video.summary: Kevin and Bryan continue the work on Kevin’s LSM3 project.
Video.title: LSM3

Video.summary: Kevin travels to Indiana to solve the mysteries of the catalytic converter.
Video.title: Inside the Cat

Video.summary: Kevin and Bryan show some cool tools and shop tips while working on Kevin’s Hot Rod BMW.
Video.title: Cool Tools

Video.summary: Kevin services a tournament series high performance boat while Bryan welds up a new casting platform.
Video.title: Boating Maintenance

Video.summary: Kevin and Bryan hit the road and take in a classic auto show and take a tour at Monster Transmission and Performance.
Video.title: Monster Transmission Auto Show

Video.summary: Kevin and Bryan show us the proper way to upgrade the power steering system on an older vehicle and offer some other useful maintenance tips.
Video.title: Power Steering Upgrade

Video.summary: A new season kicks off with some big numbers: Featuring the world's fastest C8 Corvette, an overpowered Cortina Mark I, and a Buick Regal with over 1,700 horsepower
Video.title: Voices: Blackberry Smoke

Video.summary: C & O: North America's most diverse car show: Featuring custom Bugs, John Kaase fire breathing '56 Fords, and Chevy Silverados touching 1000HP
Video.title: Voices: Bishop Rob Wright

Video.summary: C & O Jacksonville: Featuring Hurley Haywood's Brumos Porsches, a street legal Indy car, and a dynamic '60 Olds
Video.title: Brumos Collection with Hurley

Video.summary: Jacksonville's C & O's colorful and quirky car culture.
Video.title: Graffiti Artist KBMER

Video.summary: C & O: North America's greatest car show
Video.title: Voices: Sport's Radio Legend, Mike Bell

Image.alt: Voices: Sport's Radio Legend, Mike Bell
Voices: Sport's Radio Legend, Mike Bell
Voices: Sport's Radio Legend, Mike Bell

Video.summary: Caffeine & Octane: North America's greatest car show
Video.title: Voices: Killer Mike

Video.summary: Amelia Island's own Caffeine & Octane car show,: Featuring $2,000 Wrek Racing Truck, David Patterson's favorite C&O cars, a plastic Citroen Mehari, and much more.
Video.title: Fuller's Fab 5

Video.summary: The Concours d'Elegance from Amelia Island: Featuring bomb-proof Conquest Knight XV, '69 Camaro Hagerty Fixer-Upper, and car-enthusiast John Oates.
Video.title: Generation Amelia

Video.summary: State-of-the-art engineering and passion projects take center stage on this edition of Caffeine & Octane. The revolutionary Delta Wing Racer turns on hot lap after hot lap at Road Atlanta, and driver Katherine Legge offers insight on how “less is more” when it comes to power to weight ratios; the dark world of a graffiti artist paints a picture of a car called Vengeance while the hosts share the eclectic hybrids of machines that make it to Caffeine and Octane with Vengance’s creator Totem.
Video.title: Delta Wing Racer with a Vengeance

Image.alt: Delta Wing Racer with a Vengeance
Delta Wing Racer with a Vengeance
Delta Wing Racer with a Vengeance

Video.summary: The word is out that Caffeine & Octane is the ultimate scene and the place to be seen. Even after 12 hours of racing at the Petit Le Mans endurance race, Henry Ford III, the great grandson of Henry Ford the industrial magnate and current member of Ford’s Board of Directors, showed up to take in the sights, address the crowds, and sign a one of a kind Ford Shelby GT350R. The GT350R will hit the road with Operation Hope to encourage young people to study math and science through motorsports; Covert car counterfeiter, Chuck Beck looks for Ford’s approval on his own version of a muscled up Festiva. YouTuber ‘That Dude in Blue’ David Patterson joins Skip and Bryan to get a special look at the motor-based philanthropic outreach and amazing cars that come with it done by John Hope Bryant, friend of Caffeine and Octane.
Video.title: Henry Ford III & Counterfeit Cars

Video.summary: Rickey and Bryan race outside of their comfort zones, each competing to find the raddest car collection. Rickey hangs out with classic racer, Ron Green, who shows him the ropes in the ultra light '83 Ralt RT5. Bryan visits a collection of 120 racing motorcycle owned by mechanic and racer Mike McConville. Mike takes Bryan motorcross racing in his backyard after showing off his high horsepowered car collection. Caffeine and Octane alongside Ron Green visit Atlanta's first Concours d'elegance to look at classic cars that have been perfectly maintained for decades.
Video.title: Go Fast Collections

Video.summary: Wayne Phears’ Jaguar E-Type was nothing more than a diamond in the rough before the mineral rights attorney took on the basket case. Caffeine & Octane brings viewers the story of how Phears’, through relentless research and determination, restored and reunited the #10 Jag that Enzo Ferrari called “the most beautiful car ever made”; Atlanta Wraps shows how wrapping Corvettes and Lamborghinis can color a car fast. Caffeine and Exotics is featured again to show off the coolest wraps Atlanta can supply.
Video.title: The Wrap on the Most Beautiful Cars

Image.alt: The Wrap on the Most Beautiful Cars
The Wrap on the Most Beautiful Cars
The Wrap on the Most Beautiful Cars

Video.summary: Twenty-five years of hand building record-setting race cars is no easy task. But don’t tell that to Don Panoz who takes on Porsches and Ferraris with his laid back personality and a full-production facility that makes improvised versions of Americas V-8’s; Caffeine & Octane gets an exclusive look at an elusive man’s life long pursuit of everything Chevrolet.
Video.title: Panoz Racing & Chasing Chevys

Video.summary: Caffeine & Octane goes old school with Psycho Deville singer and pin striper Walt Richards. Richards has less than a week to hand paint his signature flames on a way cool ’50 Mercury. An introduction to Retrofit Lighting’s trickle down technology - from cars to motorcycles - that will revolutionize how bikes will see and be seen.
Video.title: Retrofitting a Psycho Mercury

Video.summary: Caffeine & Octane is known for having something for everyone. That reputation is tested when over 100 VW’s, on the lunatic fringe of automotive, rattled into an event. The annual VW Invasion has swarmed C&O, bringing with it Bugs, Beetles, Buses and more by a very dedicated VW fan base.
Video.title: Beetles, Bugs, and Buses, Oh My!

Image.alt: Beetles, Bugs, and Buses, Oh My!
Beetles, Bugs, and Buses, Oh My!
Beetles, Bugs, and Buses, Oh My!

Video.summary: C & O Jacksonville: Featuring Hurley Haywood's Brumos Porsches, a street legal Indy car, and a dynamic '60 Olds
Video.title: Episode 1
